renamed_modules.description: Tracks modules that have been renamed. Used by the website to generate redirects and by tooling to assist with upgrades.

old_name.description: The previous module name (directory name under packages/infrastructure/).

new_name.description: The current module name (directory name under packages/infrastructure/).

motivation.description: Inline markdown describing why the module was renamed.

removed_modules.description: Tracks modules that have been removed entirely. Used by the website and tooling to inform users during upgrades.

name.description: The name of the removed module (former directory name under packages/infrastructure/).

motivation.description: Inline markdown describing why the module was removed.
